about.title: Tradition Meets Innovation
about.paragraph1: For over three decades, we've been at the forefront of textile manufacturing, combining time-honored craftsmanship with cutting-edge technology.
about.paragraph2: Our journey began with a simple vision: to create fabrics that inspire designers and delight end consumers. Today, we partner with leading fashion brands worldwide, delivering premium textiles that set new standards in quality and innovation.
about.paragraph3: Every thread we weave carries our commitment to excellence. From the selection of raw materials to the final quality check, we ensure that each fabric meets our exacting standards.

about_factory.title: 🏭 About Our Factory
about_factory.intro: Our production process is divided into two main stages: Collection Phase and Production Phase, each carefully managed to ensure quality and precision.
about_factory.certifications: Our factory is proud to be certified with ISO 9001, ISO 14001, GOTS, and GRS, reflecting our commitment to quality, environmental responsibility, and sustainable production.

collection_phase.phase1: PHASE 1 — Receipt of the technical file and creation of the pattern.
collection_phase.phase2: PHASE 2 — Sourcing of fabrics and accessories, prototype making.
collection_phase.phase3: PHASE 3 — Technical adjustments and repetitions (SMS) before production.

production_phase.phase1: PHASE 1 — Technical preparation and seeded players (TDS).
production_phase.phase2: PHASE 2 — Cutting, sewing, washing and finishing.
production_phase.phase3: PHASE 3 — Export and delivery of finished products.
